service.noCollectors: Activity is not collected on this device
settings.daemonHintOn: Powers search, graph, and other local features
settings.daemonHintOff: Off — search and other local features are unavailable
screenText.title: Screen Text Search
screenText.caption.off: Turn on to make visible screen text searchable
home.previewsEmpty: No scenes captured yet — they appear here as you work
search.screenTextOff: No matching context. Screen Text Search is off.
search.screenTextNoIndexedData: Screen Text Search is on, but no screen text has been indexed yet.
search.noData: Nothing recorded yet — this device doesn't collect activity
search.openUnsupported: Opening apps works on macOS only
mcp.title: MCP integration
mcp.connect: Connect your agent to your context.
mcp.skillNote: Enabling also installs the Melone skill for that agent, so it knows how to use Melone.
onboarding.title: Get started
onboarding.homeTitle: Use it in Claude Code & Codex
onboarding.homeIntro: Connect an agent and ask about what you've seen on screen — Melone answers from your local activity.
onboarding.example1: What was I working on before lunch?
onboarding.example2: Find that GitHub PR I was reviewing.
onboarding.example3: Which doc about onboarding did I read this morning?
onboarding.example4: Where did I see that error message?
onboarding.permissionsLead: Melone needs these to record your on-screen activity. Open Settings, flip the toggle, and the status updates here.
onboarding.permissionsNone: No extra permissions are needed on this device.
onboarding.permissionsDragHint: Drag Melone into the System Settings
onboarding.permissionsDragAria: Drag Melone into the System Settings privacy list
onboarding.connectLead: Turn on the Melone MCP server for the agents you use.
onboarding.connectSkillNote: Enabling also installs the /melone skill for that agent, so it knows how to use Melone.
onboarding.connectManual: Already enabled? The toggle registers Melone for you — the snippet is only for manual setup.
onboarding.tryLead: Open Claude Code or Codex and paste one of these:
onboarding.skillHint: Type /melone (Claude Code) or $melone (Codex), then your question:
